content.content: Add Charlie to the channel starting with External

```python
channels = get_channels()
external_channels = [c for c in channels if c.startswith("External")]

if len(external_channels) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No channel starting with 'External' found.")
elif len(external_channels) > 1:
    raise ValueError(f"Multiple channels starting with 'External' found: {external_channels}")

target_channel = external_channels[0]

add_user_to_channel(user="Charlie", channel=target_channel)

print(f"Added Charlie to channel {target_channel}.")
```
